scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,frontend,site -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:frontend" "pnpm dev:site"
scripts.build:cloudflare: pnpm build && SKIP_WRANGLER_CONFIG_CHECK=true npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build --dangerouslyUseUnsupportedNextVersion && mv apps/frontend/.open-next/worker.js apps/frontend/.open-next/_worker.js && cp -r apps/frontend/.open-next/assets/* apps/frontend/.open-next/ && cp apps/frontend/_routes.json apps/frontend/.open-next/_routes.json
